task.objective: Post-bootstrap milestone 8 (first slice) per ADR-0008: .canopyrt v1 runtime container (checksummed sections, JSON descriptors + raw typed buffers, three profile-baked LODs), authoring-side compiler sharing merge-by-material with glTF, validating runtime loader depending on foundation only, CPU forest slice (deterministic scatter, distance-band LOD selection, distance culling), canopy-cli compile command, canopy-runtime-demo reference program linking runtime libs only, and a rendered mixed-species forest showcase.

outputs: src/runtime/core: format constants + validating loader (magic/version/endianness/flags, section table bounds, per-section sha256, index/primitive/material cross-reference checks, non-finite rejection)
src/runtime/forest: Forest with deterministic scatter (rejection sampling with order-independent draws), LOD bands, distance culling
src/export: mesh_merge shared helper (glTF refactored onto it) + rt_compile writer
tests/unit/test_runtime.cpp: round-trip counts/bounds, byte-determinism, corruption/truncation/magic rejection, scatter determinism + spacing, LOD monotonicity + culling

validation.result: 100% tests passed (15 suites) on both presets

validation.command: canopy-cli compile + canopy-runtime-demo (4 species, seed 20, 42 instances)
validation.result: forest baked via runtime libraries only: 42/42 visible, LOD histogram {lod0: 4, lod1: 35, lod2: 3}, 1,818,808 triangles; per-species LOD triangle counts recorded in manifests

risks: Runtime surface is C++ static libs; the stable C ABI and no-exceptions/RTTI boundary hardening are separate work units
Discrete profile-baked LODs; continuous LOD, billboards, wind vertex channels, collision and skeleton sections extend the container later (format has room via typed sections + feature flags)
Forest culling is distance-only; frustum culling and cell streaming pending
Loader reads whole files into memory; memory-mapped path pending
